8:["$","p",null,{"children":["Create ",["$","code",null,{"children":"/etc/systemd/system/mnemosyne.service"}],":"]}]
9:["$","$L18",null,{"code":"[Unit]\nDescription=Mnemosyne Memory Server\nAfter=network.target\n\n[Service]\nType=simple\nUser=mnemosyne\nGroup=mnemosyne\nWorkingDirectory=/opt/mnemosyne\nEnvironment=\"MNEMOSYNE_DATA_DIR=/opt/mnemosyne/data\"\nEnvironment=\"MNEMOSYNE_MCP_TOKEN=***\"\nExecStart=/opt/mnemosyne/venv/bin/python -m mnemosyne.mcp_server --transport sse --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8080\nRestart=always\nRestartSec=5\n\n[Install]\nWantedBy=multi-user.target\n","language":"ini"}]
a:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Setup"}]
b:["$","$L18",null,{"code":"# Create user\nsudo useradd -r -s /bin/false mnemosyne\n\n# Create directories\nsudo mkdir -p /opt/mnemosyne/data\nsudo chown -R mnemosyne:mnemosyne /opt/mnemosyne\n\n# Install in virtualenv\nsudo -u mnemosyne bash -c '\ncd /opt/mnemosyne\npython3 -m venv venv\nvenv/bin/pip install \"mnemosyne-memory[mcp]\"\n'\n\n# Copy service file\nsudo cp mnemosyne.service /etc/systemd/system/\nsudo systemctl daemon-reload\nsudo systemctl enable mnemosyne\nsudo systemctl start mnemosyne\n","language":"bash"}]
